recommendations.title: Quatermass and the Pit
recommendations.overview: A mysterious artifact unearthed below a London Underground station proves to have powerful psychic effects on the people around.

recommendations.title: Don't Bother to Knock
recommendations.overview: An airline pilot pursues a live-in babysitter at his hotel and gradually realizes she is not as stable as perhaps she should be.

recommendations.title: The Monster Club

recommendations.title: The Vault of Horror
recommendations.overview: The sequel to Tales from the Crypt.  Five strangers trapped in a basement vault converse about their recurring nightmares. Their stories include vampires, bodily dismemberment, east Indian mysticism, an insurance scam, and an artist who kills by pain

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll & Sister Hyde

recommendations.title: The Vampire Lovers

recommendations.title: Scars of Dracula
recommendations.overview: The Prince of Darkness casts his undead shadow once more over the cursed village of Kleinenberg when his ashes are splashed with bat's blood and Dracula is resurrected. And two innocent victims search for a missing loved one... loved to death by Drac

recommendations.title: A Night to Remember
recommendations.overview: The sinking of the Titanic is presented in a highly realistic fashion in this tense British drama. The disaster is portrayed largely from the perspective of the ocean liner's second officer, Charles Lightoller. Despite numerous warnings about ice, th

recommendations.title: The Legend of the 7 Golden Vampires
recommendations.overview: Professor Van Helsing had been asked to help against the tyranny of skeletal creatures that are responsible for terror and death amongst the peasants in rural China. He is the only person qualified to deal with the cause of these phenomena, for the u

recommendations.title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
recommendations.overview: A petty criminal fakes insanity to serve his sentence in a mental ward rather than prison. He soon finds himself as a leader to the other patients—and an enemy to the cruel, domineering nurse who runs the ward.
